title: bernardia axillaris
intro: Bernardia axillaris, also known as the Mexican prickly ash, is a plant species native to the Americas, particularly in the regions of Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bernardia axillaris include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve pain. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
